| Issue | Root Cause | Fix |
|-------|-----------|-----|
| `mapfile` not found | macOS bash 3.2 lacks bash 4+ builtins | Replaced with `while read` loop |

| `local -n` (nameref) | bash 4.3+ only | Changed to global variable pattern |
| Last `read` line dropped | No trailing newline after base64 decode | Added `|| [ -n "$_line" ]` |
| Patcher path corrupted | Status messages mixed with stdout path | Redirected status to stderr |
| Fuyao upgrade prompt hangs | Interactive prompt on non-TTY | Pipe `echo N |` to all fuyao commands |
| `fuyao cancel` TUI hang | Interactive reason selector | Use `--signal SIGTERM` |
| `fuyao info` wrong syntax | Expected `-n` flag | Fixed to use `-n <job_name>` |
| Training never started | `--remote-kernel` creates SSH shell, not training | Added `--remote-kernel false` |
| Model files missing | `git worktree add` excludes untracked deps | Added `ensure_remote_repo_deps` + copy into worktree |
| GPU slice error | `--gpu-slice` incompatible with `--gpu-type=full` | Only include when shared/mig |
| `JOB_RECEIVED` unrecognized | New fuyao status not in parser | Added to pending status set |
| Python heredoc/stdin conflict | Can't use heredoc for script AND pipe for data | Changed to `python3 -c` with args |
| Dirty repo (untracked files) | `.DS_Store` blocks deploy | Changed to only check tracked files |
| SSH hostname wrong | `Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao` not in SSH config | Updated to `remote.kernel.fuyo` |

## How to Use: Walkthrough

### Option A: Natural Language (easiest)

Just type `/sweep-fuyao` in Cursor and say:

> "Sweep learning_rate over 1e-4 and 3e-4, and mirror_loss_coeff over 0.1, 0.3, 0.5, on task r01_v12_sa_amp_with_4dof_arms_and_head_full_scenes using branch huh/dev_r01_v12_sa_wholestate_female, full GPU"

The agent will:
1. Parse your intent into a JSON payload
2. Show you a preview of the 6 combinations
3. Ask for confirmation
4. Run the orchestrator
5. Verify training started
6. Report results

### Option B: Direct (for scripting)

Create a payload JSON:

```json
{
  "task": "r01_v12_sa_amp_with_4dof_arms_and_head_full_scenes",
  "branch": "huh/dev_r01_v12_sa_wholestate_female",
  "local_root": "/Users/HanHu/software/motion_rl",
  "hp_specs": ["learning_rate=1e-4,3e-4", "mirror_loss_coeff=0.1,0.3,0.5"],
  "queue": "rc-wbc-4090",
  "gpu_type": "full",
  "dry_run": false
}
```

Run:

```bash
# Deploy sweep (6 combos = 2 x 3)
bash ~/.cursor/scripts/orchestrator.sh --payload /path/to/payload.json

# Verify training started
bash ~/.cursor/scripts/verify_fuyao_jobs.sh --run-root <run_root_from_output> --poll-interval 60 --max-attempts 10

# Cancel all jobs (when done testing)
bash ~/.cursor/scripts/orchestrator.sh --cancel-sweep <run_root>
```

### Option C: Dry Run First (recommended for new sweeps)

Set `"dry_run": true` in the payload. This generates all commands without submitting to Fuyao, so you can verify the parameter combinations and fuyao commands are correct before committing GPU resources.
